name: froglet
description: Discover, invoke, and publish services on the Froglet protocol. Search the marketplace, run compute, manage async tasks.
author: Armanas Povilionis-Muradian

FROGLET_PROVIDER_URL.description: Provider base URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8080). Fallback: FROGLET_BASE_URL

FROGLET_RUNTIME_URL.description: Runtime base URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8081). Fallback: FROGLET_BASE_URL

FROGLET_PROVIDER_AUTH_TOKEN_PATH.description: Path to provider auth token file. Fallback: FROGLET_AUTH_TOKEN_PATH

FROGLET_RUNTIME_AUTH_TOKEN_PATH.description: Path to runtime auth token file. Fallback: FROGLET_AUTH_TOKEN_PATH

FROGLET_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds (default: 10000, max: 60000)

FROGLET_MAX_SEARCH_LIMIT.description: Maximum search result limit (default: 50, absolute max: 200)
